---
layout: cv
title: Jerry Thomas Twiggs Resume
---
# Isaac Newton
Data Science major at BYU - Idaho

<div id="webaddress">
<a href="twi23005@byui.edu">twi23005@byyui.edu</a>
</div>

## Currently

A Junior in Data Science at Brigham Young University - Idaho

### Research interests

(something will go here eventually)


## Education

`2024 - Present`
__Brigham Young University - Idaho__
Data Science major

`2020-2021`
__University of Utah__
Quantitative Analysis of Markets and Organizations major

`2018 - 2020`
__Utah Tech University__
Associate's degree - Associate of Science

`2017 - 2020`
__ACE / Success Academy Dixie__
High School Diploma

## Awards

`2020`
Sterling Scholarship Winner


## Occupation
`2024 - present`
__College Student__


<!-- ### Footer

Last updated: May 2024 -->
